chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1290 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 5023/25 3.For hearing of main case 06-11-2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Learned AAG files statements on behalf of respondents No.2&3, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioners, who after going through the same and under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is according disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
